text: so guys I have brought a flask cheat sheet for you many of you do programming in flask I have already uploaded python cheat sheet you can access this playlist and I have given the links of all the videos in the description of respective cheat sheets so you can download from there now after python cheat sheet if anyone is doing flask specific stuff then there are many things that he would need in flask for example the most important thing that is needed when I personally use flask is this thing by copying you can start your project now what happens is many people sit to type this but they are in phone so they face problem so if you are doing in phone or online id so you can copy and paste from here so this cheat sheet can be very helpful for you directly click here and copy and oops I have clicked you can paste by right clicking and here your code will be pasted as is now if you want to print this you can print this cheat sheet by pressing ctrl p if you want to download in pdf then I will put a button below I have put a button below all the old cheat sheets in which you will get a download button in which I have written download this cheat sheet so if you click here then your cheat sheet will be downloaded you can click here and save it if you get any small typo in this cheat sheet then do comment below many people have commented and improved the old cheat sheets or if you have any such thing that you think that I should add this thing in the cheat sheet so it will be beneficial for all of us as a community we can improve this cheat sheet more I hope you guys liked the creation of this cheat sheet I will bring jayango's cheat sheet also there are many more things like git linux etc I will bring their cheat sheet also very soon all the links will be in the description that's all for now in this video guys thank you so much guys for watching this video and I will see you next time
